alert_contact_chv: Contact your CHV or visit the nearest health facility immediately if you experience:
registration_info: Registered mothers: log in with your phone number and password (your first name + @123, e.g. Mercy@123).
no_pregnancy_text: Your CHV will register your pregnancy during a home visit or you can visit your nearest health facility.
danger_signs_warning: Contact your CHV or clinic immediately if you experience severe headache, blurred vision, vaginal bleeding, or severe abdominal pain.
bp_high: High BP - Please consult your CHV
name: Name
about_app: Improving maternal health in Trans-Nzoia County
onboarding_text: Your pregnancy will be registered when you visit a health facility or when a CHV visits you. You can still track symptoms, find nearby facilities, and learn about danger signs.
postnatal_checkup_text: Visit your nearest facility within 6 weeks of delivery for a postnatal checkup
breastfeeding_text: Breastfeed exclusively for the first 6 months. Continue breastfeeding alongside complementary foods up to 2 years.
danger_signs_postpartum: Contact your CHV or clinic if you experience: heavy bleeding, severe headache, fever with chills, breast pain, or difficulty breathing.
no_facilities: No facilities found matching your criteria.
no_active_pregnancy: No active pregnancy found. Cannot book appointment.
track_health_at_home: At home you can track your weight, blood pressure, and symptoms to share with your CHV.
evidenced_based_advice: Evidence-based advice for a healthy pregnancy.
enter_phone_password: Please enter phone number and password
reg_no_self: Mothers cannot self-register in this app. Your registration must be done by:
chv_desc: Visit your local CHV in your village or community. They will register you and provide your login credentials.
health_facility_desc: Visit any health facility in Trans-Nzoia County. The facility staff will register you during your visit.
reg_info_after: After registration, you will receive your phone number and a temporary password to log in.
appointment_booked: Appointment booked! You will receive a reminder.
no_tips_category: No tips available for this category.
no_facilities_connection: No facilities found. Check your connection or try a different search.
logout_confirm: Are you sure you want to logout?
phone_name_lmp_required: Phone, name, LMP date, ward, and village are required
mother_registered: Mother registered successfully with active pregnancy
reg_mother_subtitle: Register a pregnant mother — creates account + pregnancy record
step_name_desc: Please enter your first and last name as they appear on your national ID.
step_dob_title: What is your date of birth?
step_dob_desc: This helps us provide age-appropriate care recommendations.
step_pregnancy_desc: Enter your last menstrual period date if you know it, and select your pregnancy stage.
step_location_desc: Enter your village and ward so we can suggest health facilities near you.
no_villages: No villages found for this ward
step_account_desc: Choose a phone number and password to log in.
already_have_account: Already have an account? Log in
signup_success_body: Your account has been created. Now let's set up your pregnancy diary to help us provide personalized care.
fill_required_fields: Please fill in all required fields.
valid_kenyan_phone: Please enter a valid Kenyan phone number (e.g. +254712345678).
diary_intro: Tell us about yourself so we can personalize your care journey.
diary_prenatal_desc: Help us understand your health history for a safer pregnancy.
diary_postnatal_desc: Tell us about your delivery preferences and emergency contacts.
diary_childcare_desc: Help us understand your childcare needs and support system.
chronic_conditions: Do you have any chronic conditions?
medications_placeholder: List any medications you are taking
delivery_plan: Where do you plan to deliver?
support_person_placeholder: Who will support you during delivery?
family_planning_placeholder: Any plans for family planning after birth?
knows_vaccinations: Are you aware of newborn vaccinations?
care_support: Who will help care for the baby?
emergency_transport: Do you have access to transport in an emergency?
diary_complete: Pregnancy diary saved! Your personalized dashboard is ready.
diary_prompt_text: Fill in your health details to unlock your personalized dashboard with measurements, appointments, and health tips.
